meaning: n.比利时、荷兰、卢森堡三国经济联盟,全称(Benelux Economic Union)
examples: One of these organizations is the Benelux Chamber of Commerce.
We therefore are strong representatives of the Benelux community in Beijing and Shanghai.
So far only Scandinavia and the Benelux countries have seen significant cross-border bank mergers.
The integrationist camp - especially the founding countries in the Benelux, Germany and France - has lost.
